creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: gnome->ade

I'll take care of this one since I'm doing another sweep of the GNOME 
metaport for a few updates, and will merge your gdm work into mine. 

Thanks for the offer of maintainership, however it was a specific policy 
decision to move maintainership of all primary ports that make up 
both GNOME metaports to gnome@FreeBSD.org to ensure the integrity of 
the system at all times.
